remediation: System operating within EU AI Act compliance bounds.
Art. 9 — Implement continuous drift monitoring with δ logged per inference batch; trigger risk review when δ exceeds 0.15.
Art. 14 — Reduce active cartridge count or increase confidence threshold to restore effective human oversight capacity; consider automatic routing of uncertain predictions.
